就是咋没人看？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771688158,"group_id":"7608198687629528126","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"补豪孩子们有桂😱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxsozjFKaDvs+GeooBuJ1JsPa8MftfiyDiny9aoW9mkN","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a807d59823784af6b980fc801cf90999~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703668&x-signature=1jvyn7wLJGZdnogNNMJ7jC7vDiE%3D","user_id":"2283020259700382","user_name":"云锦玖竹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2283020259700382","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748967915,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608198687629528126","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚开，欢迎试读】
参加个漫展，居然莫名其妙穿进了火影世界。
穿个什么不好，偏偏穿成了宇智波佐助的双胞胎弟弟。
穿成弟弟也就算了，还是个刚生下来就被遗弃的那个。
哪怕被神秘的水树一族收养也完全开心不起来，谁都知道火影世界的死亡率超高啊！和快被灭族的宇智波扯上关系更是危险加倍！
伊吹沉默，伊吹捂脸：想要活命，他必须远离宇智波兄弟——自己在这个世界的两位兄长。
但情况显然不受他控制……
谁能告诉他，为什么这两个哥哥看他的眼神都那么不对劲？！
哥哥那种东西他完全不需要啊！
排雷：
1.双男主，宇智波兄弟，主受HE，开放结局。
2.日常向，非常慢热，大量OOC，想看感情线可以跳章哦~很久以前写的，只到火影【前期】剧情。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odb6a1e0aef7ae9d8025ec7e0178851ed~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"奶芙糯糯","author_id":"","book_id":"7608198687629528126","book_name":"我在宇智波，被鼬和佐助搞cp","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7608199865981469246","read_count":"37288","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"247512"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"79","tags":"双男主,纯爱,二次元,异世穿越,穿越,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c85c53f1098f216365468e55dc57e654~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302521&x-signature=2GqtrJ5YZv0PGLGEUw1OGD%2BneRk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2758003957450615","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322024201C14837FED1E82EB8A4F5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30
